hero.title: Ship Anywhere. Track Everything.
hero.description: Enterprise-grade logistics infrastructure trusted by 10,000+ businesses worldwide for secure, fast, and reliable delivery solutions. Real-time visibility from pickup to delivery.

step1.title: Enter your number
step1.description: Type your tracking number into the search box.

step2.title: See live status
step2.description: View the current status, route, and full event timeline.

step3.title: Get notified
step3.description: Opt in to email updates so you never have to check manually.

featureHighlights.title:
Every shipment follows a route.
So does every reason to trust it.
featureHighlights.subtitle: Four checkpoints on the way from “received” to “delivered.”

testimonials.title: What people say once it arrives.

tracking.question: How do I track my shipment?
tracking.answer: Enter your tracking number on the homepage or the Track page to see its current status and full history.

trackingNotWorking.question: My tracking number isn't working. What do I do?
trackingNotWorking.answer: Double-check the number for typos. If it still doesn't work, reach out through the Contact page and we'll look into it.

international.question: Do you ship internationally?
international.answer: Yes, international shipping is available — see the Services page for details.

emailUpdates.question: How do I get email updates about my shipment?
emailUpdates.answer: Once you look up your tracking number, you'll see an option to enter your email and get notified at every status change.

deliveryTime.question: How long does delivery take?
deliveryTime.answer: Delivery times vary by service and destination. Check the estimated delivery date shown on your tracking page.

exceptionStatus.question: What if my package shows an exception status?
exceptionStatus.answer: An exception means there's an issue that needs attention (e.g. a customs hold or delay). Check the timeline on your tracking page for details, or contact us for help.

testimonial1.quote: I had a customs hold on an international shipment and actually knew what was happening the whole time instead of guessing. That alone is worth it.

testimonial2.quote: We switched our warehouse's outbound deliveries here after one too many 'where's my package' calls from customers. Those calls basically stopped.

testimonial3.quote: Express delivery actually meant express. My package showed up a day earlier than the estimate, and I got an email the moment it left the hub.

banner.title: About World Cargo Express
banner.subtitle: Connecting the world through innovative logistics and unwavering reliability since 1998.

story.title: Built by people who move things for a living
paragraphs: Founded in 1998 with a single delivery van and a vision to simplify local shipping, World Cargo Express has been at the forefront of global logistics since 1998.

We recognized early on that technology would revolutionize logistics. By investing heavily in tracking infrastructure and automated sorting facilities, we set new standards for transparency and speed.

Today, we operate a massive fleet of vehicles and aircraft, serving millions of customers across 150+ countries. Yet, our core mission remains unchanged: to deliver your promises, on time, every time.

reliability.title: Reliability
reliability.description: Every shipment tracked and accounted for, start to finish.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.description: You always know exactly where things stand — no guesswork.
